headline: We regret to inform you: paperwork is contagious.
subhead: Please initial the corner of your soul and proceed.
bulletins: Approval stamp deployed with theatrical confidence.
Your inbox is drizzling passive-aggression with a 60% chance of 'circling back.'
Reminder: sighs must be filed in triplicate.
Stapler has been promoted to manager (against everyone's wishes).

feature.name: Sigh Ledger
feature.description: All sighs must be logged. Please provide a receipt for each exhale.
